comment: 108 bpm, 4/4 time, triplet subdivisions, 4 bars per cycle, base pitch G3 (55), with a bias towards Gm pentatonic.

The note probability array has been adjusted to create a stronger bias towards the Gm pentatonic scale, which includes the notes G (55), Bb (58), C (60), D (62), and F (65). The probabilities have been set to favor these notes while still allowing for some variation.
